title: acalypha integrifolia var. parvifolia
intro: Acalypha integrifolia var. parvifolia, also known as the small-leaved copperleaf or small-leaf copperleaf, is a plant species belonging to the family Euphorbiaceae. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antipyretic, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Acalypha integrifolia var. parvifolia include treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as being used as a diuretic. The plant can be prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its leaves and stems can be used to make herbal remedies such as teas, tinctures, and ointments.
